heading: Powers
label: 21006 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2100636 App.:5902., , .Aug. 13, 1998Pub. L. 105–231, § 2112 Stat. 1530The words “each State in which it is incorporated” are substituted for “the State of Texas” for consistency in the revised title. The words “and subject to the laws of the State of Texas” are omitted as unnecessary.
